top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Rise as CPI Eases Rate-Hike Fears
top_signals.summary: US equity futures advanced after Wednesday’s inflation print calmed investor fears of Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes, while a swift end to renewed American strikes on Iran kept oil prices in check.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Treasury yields steady as investors monitor inflation data, U.S. strikes in Iran
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasurys steadied Thursday, as investors monitored developments in the Middle East conflict ahead of further inflation data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines' central bank says Binance and its local partner lack licenses to operate
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: India protests to U.S. after strike kills three Indian sailors
top_signals.summary: The vessel Settebello was carrying 24 Indian crew members, 21 of whom have been rescued, India's Ministry of External Affairs said in a statement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes BitLocker recovery bug on Windows Server 2025
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has resolved a known issue causing some Windows Server 2025 devices to boot into BitLocker recovery after installing the April 2026 security update. [...]
